---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new endpoint
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?
<!-- The actual Shopify or workflow problem, not a proposed solution -->

## What would you want the Worker to do?
<!-- One paragraph is fine -->

## Why does this belong in the lite version?
<!-- The lite version stays focused on Shopify products + pages.
     New upstream services (other APIs, fulfillment, AI proxies, etc.)
     generally belong in the Pro bundle, not the lite version.
     If this is a fix or improvement to existing Shopify endpoints, ignore this section. -->

## Have you looked at the Pro bundle?
<!-- The Pro bundle on Gumroad includes Lulu print-on-demand, Anthropic API
     proxy, HMAC-verified webhooks, two-variant book products, and an
     extended troubleshooting guide. If that covers your need, great —
     no issue needed. -->
